rationale: Primary entity name field at the top of the Amended Annual Report. Domestic nonprofit so entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its incorporation is ___
rationale: Home jurisdiction recital. For domestic nonprofits this will be 'Maine' (or 'ME'). Same key family as MBCA-12 / MLLC-12 (foreign-qualification) — re-used here for the recital even though the entity is Maine-domestic.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date the current year's annual report was filed ___
rationale: Date the prior (un-amended) annual report was filed; the amendment must reference and post-date this. New key under filing.* because it is a property of the filing being amended, not of the entity.

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 1
label_verbatim: THIRD: The information has changed as follows (attach additional pages, if necessary): (line 1)
rationale: First inline text line of the THIRD changes-description block. Uses the .line{N} convention established for multi-line text widgets (cf. mark.text_words.line{1,2}, mark.usage_description.line{1,2}).

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 2
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 3
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 4
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 5
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 6
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 7
rationale: Seventh and last inline text line; the form's 'attach additional pages, if necessary' instruction implies overflow goes to a separate sheet, not a separate widget. No opt-in checkbox or exhibit-letter widget.

Date on which the reported changes actually took effect (e.g., the date a director resigned or a new address took effect). Distinct from filing.original_annual_report_date (the filing date of the report being amended) and filing.date_signed (when this amendment is signed).
Date the amended report was signed by the authorized officer (top-left of page 1).

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: *By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget, Shape D (matches MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-21, MNPCA-12B). The signature line above is wet-ink only with no widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (rarely used on a single-form amendment).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($35 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
